dialog.title: Confirm Submission
dialog.description: You can complete this questionnaire only once. At this stage, you may still change your answers if there is anything you would like to revise.

questions.question: What is meant by equitable development?
options: Development focused only on economic growth
Development distributed evenly without considering quality
Development that benefits all layers of society equally
Development concentrated in urban areas

questions.question: An example of a policy reflecting equitable development is…
options: Building skyscrapers in the capital city
Providing education subsidies for low-income families
Increasing taxes for all citizens without exception
Prioritizing large industries over SMEs

questions.question: Why is equitable development important for national progress?
options: Reducing population growth
Preventing social jealousy and inequality
Accelerating urbanization
Increasing competition between regions

questions.question: The main principle of equitable development is…
options: The strongest gets ahead
Equal distribution of results and opportunities
Maximum profit for investors
Development as fast as possible

questions.question: The role of civil society in supporting equitable development is…
options: Being apathetic toward public policy
Allowing social inequality without oversight
Actively participating and monitoring development implementation
Focusing only on personal or organizational interests

questions.question: What is INFID's role in advocating equitable development?
options: Producing research and organizing policy dialogues with government and stakeholders
Providing assistance to victims of violence
Offering legal assistance forums for human rights violation victims
Opening public donations for humanitarian aid
